ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audio_files" (
  "file_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each audio file */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker who recorded the audio */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device used to record the audio */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the speaker and the device */,
  "text_length" INTEGER /* Text length of the audio transcription */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the audio file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_duration" REAL /* Duration of the audio file in seconds */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* Sample rate of the audio file */,
  "bit_rate" INTEGER /* Bit rate of the audio file */,
  "format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., WAV, MP3) */,
  "channel_count" INTEGER /* Number of audio channels */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the file is public or private */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the audio file (e.g., interview, meeting) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the audio file */,
  "distance_range_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distance range (foreign key to distance_ranges) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_files_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_files_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_files_distance_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("distance_range_id") REFERENCES distance_ranges ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the speaker */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the speaker belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the speaker */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the speaker in the organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the speaker record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the speaker record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., mic, android, ios) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the device record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the device record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcriptions" (
  "transcription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcription */,
  "file_id" TEXT /* ID of the audio file being transcribed */,
  "transcription_text" TEXT /* Text transcription of the audio file */,
  "transcription_date" TEXT /* Date the transcription was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the transcription (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "transcriber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcriber (foreign key to users) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transcription was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transcription was last updated */,
  "text_length_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text length range (foreign key to text_lengths) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcriptions_text_length_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_length_id") REFERENCES text_lengths ("length_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcriptions_transcriber_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcriber_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcriptions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" TEXT /* ID of the audio file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the audio file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the audio file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., listen, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the file */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the device type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the device type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distance_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance range */,
  "min_distance" REAL /* Minimum distance for the range */,
  "max_distance" REAL /* Maximum distance for the range */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the distance range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the distance range record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the distance range record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_lengths" (
  "length_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text length */,
  "min_length" INTEGER /* Minimum text length for the range */,
  "max_length" INTEGER /* Maximum text length for the range */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the text length */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the text length record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the text length record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("length_id")
)
